The '''GK-5 sentry droid''' was a squat, multi-legged [[Droid/Legends|droid]] in operation during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was similar in appearance to the [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]] and [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droids]] that were part of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

One GK-5 sentry droid was stationed on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the Civil War, where it was recruited by [[HK-47]] as part of his growing droid army.

==Equipment==
GK-5, and other GK variants, mainly used carbines, bothan bola carbines, flechette weaponry, or any other heavy blasters, which often proved very deadly.

==Other Known Variants==
GK-5 was a small model; its successors included the GK-6, GK-17, GK-18, [[GK Oppressor]] and Doom Bringer.
